title: Rio Grande Bend
description: The great river curves through green bottomland under a lavender twilight sky, mountains fading in the distance.

images.alt: Rio Grande curving through green vegetation under twilight sky

story: Not all of Big Bend is harsh desert. Along the river, cottonwoods and willows create ribbons of green that follow the water through the landscape. Susan shot this bend at dusk when the sky turned lavender and the river caught the last light. The sage greens and twilight purples here became foundation colors for the Burro night palette.
leadTimeNote: Archival pigment print on cotton rag. Ships flat within 5 business days.
